subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who, should He pronounce judgment with "Nay" for any soul, verily it is the sweetest decree; and should He ordain "Yea," he would choose it over all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی لو یجری لاحد حکم لا انه لهو الاحلی و ان یحکم ببلی یختاره عن
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
